# Contextvars Patch

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

Patch Odoo threadlocals-based Environments to use contextvars instead. This is useful
when the Odoo ORM must be used together with asyncio code that may lead to the execution
spanning multiple threads.

This module must not be ported beyond 14.0.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

documentation: Context manager for a set of environments.

functions.name: odoo.addons.base_contextvars.contextvars_patch.contextvars_reset
documentation:
Clear the set of environments.
This may be useful when recreating a registry inside a transaction.
